mapper.select:
SELECT O.order_id, O.order_no, CASE WHEN O.est_id IS NOT NULL AND O.est_id > 0 THEN 'ESTIMATE' ELSE 'PURCHASE ORDER' END AS docType, O.order_status, U.user_no, U.user_id, U.user_name, U.phone, O.reg_dtime FROM TB_ORDER_MST O INNER JOIN TB_USERS U ON O.user_no = U.user_no INNER JOIN TB_COMPANIES CO ON U.company_cd = CO.company_cd
O.use_yn = 'Y' AND O.order_status = 'od001' AND CO.company_cd = ( SELECT company_cd FROM TB_USERS WHERE user_no = #{userNo} ) /* 검색 필터 유지 */
AND O.est_id IS NOT NULL AND O.est_id > 0
AND (O.est_id IS NULL OR O.est_id = 0)
AND (O.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR U.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY O.reg_dtime DESC

SELECT O.order_id, O.order_no, O.order_status, E.est_doc_id, E.est_no, E.ctrt_nm, E.estdt_memo, E.base_total_amount, E.target_total_amount, U.user_no, U.user_id, U.user_name, U.phone, C_MP.company_name, C_MP.company_phone, C_MP.addr_kor, CT.cart_id, CT.total_qty, CT.target_product_prc, CT.target_product_amt, OIL.fuel_nm, OIL.base_unit_prc
FROM TB_ORDER_MST O INNER JOIN TB_EST_DOC E ON O.est_id = E.est_doc_id INNER JOIN TB_USERS U ON O.user_no = U.user_no INNER JOIN TB_COMPANIES C_MP ON U.company_cd = C_MP.company_cd INNER JOIN TB_CART CT ON O.order_no = CT.order_no INNER JOIN TB_OIL_MST OIL ON CT.fuel_id = OIL.fuel_id
WHERE O.order_id = #{orderId} AND O.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT O.order_id, O.order_no, O.order_status, O.reg_dtime, U.user_no, U.user_id, U.user_name, U.phone, CO.company_name, CO.company_phone, CO.addr_kor, CT.cart_id, CT.total_qty, CT.total_price, OIL.fuel_nm, OIL.base_unit_prc FROM TB_ORDER_MST O INNER JOIN TB_USERS U ON O.user_no = U.user_no INNER JOIN TB_COMPANIES CO ON U.company_cd = CO.company_cd INNER JOIN TB_CART CT ON O.order_no = CT.order_no INNER JOIN TB_OIL_MST OIL ON CT.fuel_id = OIL.fuel_id WHERE O.order_id = #{orderId}
